name: Cross Sell Products
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CrossSellProducts2.05T5g00000gQ2ecEAC.jpg", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Cross selling", "bold": true}, {"text": " can increase basket size by interesting the customer with more products from other categories."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Upselling", "bold": true}, {"text": " is a way to increase money spent on a particular item; buy a more expensive version of the same product type or add warranties/features that relate to the product the customer is interested in."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Cross and upsells are standard on most Neto website themes. Custom or premium themes may not support cross and upsells without a design tweak"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Cross or Up sell Products"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Install the free "}, {"text": "Cross Sell Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on from the Add-on Store (under "}, {"text": "Product Management", "bold": true}, {"text": " section). The "}, {"text": "Cross Sell Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " section all appear in the product details in the control panel:"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select a product you wish to edit."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to either the "}, {"text": "Cross-sell Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab or "}, {"text": "Upsell Products", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CrossSellProducts3.05T5g00000gPvy2EAC.png", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If you don't see the cross-sell or upsell sections, click the "}, {"text": "Customise Layout", "bold": true}, {"text": " button at the top of the page and enable them."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add products to the search field. You can use parent or kitted products in this section as well if you wish."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Press "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here is an example of how it looks on your webstore. This will change depending on the theme you are using."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CrossSellProducts4.05T5g00000gQ2erEAC.png", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Upsell products can also be shown at checkout by turning on the configuration in your Web store settings."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Web Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the left side menu, and choose "}, {"text": "Webstore Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll to the "}, {"text": "Upsell Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " and toggle the option "}, {"text": "Display Upsell Page Before Checkout", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CrossSellProducts5.05T5g00000gQ2fGEAS.png", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}]}]
